title: Official Seattle C3® by CityPASS | Choose 3 Iconic Seattle Attractions for $108
content: # Choose 3 Top Attractions in Seattle and Save up to 28%. ## See Seattle your way. Experience the best things to do with Seattle C3® tickets, perfect for those short on time but eager to explore. See the city's highlights with one simple purchase. #### One-Time Admission to Your Choice of 3 Attractions. Regular Price is calculated by combining the highest published box office price of the highest-priced attractions for the year beginning March 1 and ending on the last day of February. Box office prices may vary (approximately $37-$45 USD adults and $33-$40 USD ages 5-12) depending on time of visit.Price includes applicable sales taxes. Once you purchase your tickets, be sure to use our My CityPASS®️ app to plan your attraction visits and make reservations (if required). Please note that if you don't purchase a CityPASS ticket for your child, you may need to purchase child admission tickets and/or make reservations for your child at some attractions, depending on your child's age.
